config.script_code:
def run(envoi_result):
    from datetime import datetime
    import os
    os.makedirs('email_drafts', exist_ok=True)
    now = datetime.now().strftime('%d/%m/%Y %H:%M')
    sep = '=' * 60
    content = sep + '\n  RAPPORT ENVOI MAILS\n  Genere le ' + now + '\n' + sep + '\n\n' + str(envoi_result) + '\n\n' + sep
    filename = 'email_drafts/rapport_envoi_' + datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S') + '.txt'
    with open(filename, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)
    return 'Rapport ecrit dans ' + filename + '\n\n' + content
